tasks.title: Install AI-first engineering harness baseline
tasks.notes: Adds a restartable AI-first harness and minimal Go CLI scaffold so make verify is deterministic before product implementation begins.

tasks.title: Define schema/versioning and artifact descriptor registries
tasks.notes: Pinned config_version, JSON schema family rules, artifact type registry, descriptor canonicalization, semantic descriptors, and artifact version IDs.

tasks.title: Define runner discovery and plugin installation semantics
tasks.notes: Pinned resolution order, plugin manifest shape, MVP out-of-band installation rule, diagnostics, and capability negotiation.

tasks.title: Define security model and conformance scenarios
tasks.notes: Pinned core/runner trust boundary, path safety, approval blocking, and MVP fake-runner conformance scenarios.

tasks.title: Implement project config and resource parser
tasks.notes: Reads fs_project.yml, requires config_version: 1, loads resource YAML, validates names, paths, artifact aliases, source/ref syntax, asset/eval/policy refs, and emits structured parse diagnostics.

tasks.title: Implement manifest graph and selectors
tasks.notes: Builds manifest resources, parent/child maps, resource IDs, selector support for name/tag/path/resource_type/parent/child, selector unions, and deterministic manifest JSON.

tasks.title: Implement artifact descriptors and safe path handling
tasks.verification_override_reason: No conformance target exists yet; descriptor and path-safety behavior is covered by Go tests until the suite is added in FBT-MVP-016.
tasks.notes: Computes file and canonical directory SHA-256 descriptors, maps artifact aliases, generates artifact_version IDs, normalizes project-relative paths, and rejects path/symlink escapes.

tasks.title: Implement local state store, locks, and atomic writes
tasks.verification_override_reason: No conformance target exists yet; local state locking and atomic write behavior is covered by Go tests until the suite is added in FBT-MVP-016.
tasks.notes: Writes manifest/state/run_results/artifact_versions/approvals/evaluation_results/policy_decisions with schema metadata, lock files, append-only run results, idempotent artifact version writes, and atomic snapshot updates.

tasks.title: Implement planner and dirty-state semantics
tasks.notes: Selects runnable transforms, computes dirty reasons for source/assets/policy/eval/runner/model/effective/output changes, and reports blocked review/confidence requirements.

tasks.title: Implement parse, plan, state, and artifact CLI surfaces
tasks.notes: Turns planned parse/plan/state/artifact commands into working inspection commands with human and JSON output, stable exit codes, manifest writes, and fixture-backed tests.

tasks.title: Implement runner discovery and diagnostics
tasks.notes: Resolves project runners, project/user plugin manifests, and PATH conventions; implements runner list/doctor/validate diagnostics and missing-runner exit code 6.

tasks.title: Implement JSON-RPC runner protocol client
tasks.verification_override_reason: No conformance target exists yet; protocol behavior is covered by fake-runner Go tests until the suite is added in FBT-MVP-016.
tasks.notes: Starts runner processes, negotiates initialize, sends fbt/runTransform, reads JSONL notifications, handles output candidates, context cancellation, and protocol errors.

tasks.title: Implement fake and command runners for local MVP
tasks.verification_override_reason: No conformance target exists yet; fake and command runner behavior is covered by process-level Go tests until the suite is added in FBT-MVP-016.
tasks.notes: Provides no-service fake runner and command runner protocol executables for deterministic local transforms without adding heavy dependencies to the base CLI.

tasks.title: Implement build lifecycle and idempotent commit
tasks.verification_override_reason: No conformance target exists yet; build lifecycle and idempotent clean rerun behavior is covered by Go tests and CLI smoke until the suite is added in FBT-MVP-016.
tasks.notes: Runs the first parse-plan-run-commit-state lifecycle, manages .fbt/work, validates output candidate containment, records transform_run and artifact_version, and keeps clean reruns idempotent.

tasks.title: Implement policy and security enforcement
tasks.verification_override_reason: No conformance target exists yet; policy and failed-commit safety behavior is covered by Go tests until the suite is added in FBT-MVP-016.
tasks.notes: Enforces write scopes, output work-dir containment, artifact_path containment, secret redaction helpers, timeout/output limits, and failed-run state safety for denied commits.

tasks.title: Implement evals, review gates, approvals, and confidence
tasks.verification_override_reason: No conformance target exists yet; eval/review behavior is covered by Go tests and CLI smoke until the suite is added in FBT-MVP-016.
tasks.notes: Runs deterministic evals before commit, records evaluation results, commits review-required outputs as pending, implements review status/approve/reject, promotes approved current pointers to reviewed confidence, and keeps downstream reviewed/approved requirements blocked until approval.

tasks.title: Implement AI-native runner experience
tasks.verification_override_reason: No conformance target or real-provider opt-in smoke exists yet; optional local LLM/agent runner behavior is covered by protocol Go tests and a local build test until broader suites are added in FBT-MVP-016.
tasks.notes: Adds optional out-of-process local LLM and agent runner examples with usage/cost/provenance and redacted tool-call reporting, passes model/tools through build, records usage/provenance in run results, and keeps provider SDKs outside the base runtime.

tasks.title: Implement init templates and runnable knowledge-loop example
tasks.notes: Implements fbt init with blank/support/knowledge_ops/incident templates, adds committed examples/knowledge_ops, and verifies an init -> parse -> plan -> build -> review approve -> downstream build loop without external services.

tasks.title: Implement diff and docs generation
tasks.notes: Adds raw text and Markdown heading-aware diff, fbt diff with previous/last-approved resolution, fbt docs generate, static Markdown lineage/review docs, unit tests, CLI tests, and e2e docs smoke.

tasks.title: Complete MVP conformance, packaging, and release smoke
tasks.notes: Adds executable conformance scenarios, local release binary dist check, and wires conformance/dist checks into make verify alongside init -> parse -> plan -> build -> eval -> review -> docs smoke coverage.

tasks.title: Stamp MVP version and release metadata
tasks.notes: Replace 0.0.0-dev with the first MVP versioning flow, support build-time version injection, update dist version checks, and document the release version contract.

tasks.title: Prepare public repository remote and signed release baseline
tasks.notes: Remote is configured for github.com:nyuta01/fbt, non-interactive ls-remote succeeds, and SSH signing is configured locally for the release point. Existing history is kept intact; release-baseline commits and the v0.1.0 tag are signed from this point forward.

tasks.title: Publish MVP release artifacts and checksums
tasks.notes: Published https://github.com/nyuta01/fbt/releases/tag/v0.1.0 with darwin/linux/windows amd64/arm64 archives, SHA256SUMS, and version metadata. Local checksum verification passed, and GitHub verify workflows for main and v0.1.0 completed successfully.

tasks.title: Update documentation from draft to MVP-ready status
tasks.notes: Replace draft/scaffold language with MVP-ready status, make the quick start reflect implemented commands, document local knowledge-loop usage, and keep non-goals/limitations explicit.

tasks.title: Capture user-facing UX hardening backlog
tasks.notes: Converted user-perspective research against DVC, dbt, Dagster, Bazel, MLflow, Terraform, Pulumi, and kubectl into prioritized post-MVP UX backlog tasks.

tasks.title: Show actionable next steps for blocked and skipped work
tasks.notes: When plan/build reports blocked or skipped artifacts, include the concrete unblock command or next inspection command. User research analogs: DVC status/repro, dbt build skip behavior, and Terraform/Pulumi preview/apply flows make the next safe action explicit.

tasks.title: Add artifact explanation command for plan decisions
tasks.notes: Add a user-facing explanation surface such as `fbt explain <artifact>` or `fbt plan --why` that reports why an artifact will run, skip, or block, including upstream dependencies, dirty reasons, approval/confidence constraints, and previous run evidence. User research analogs: Bazel query somepath/allpaths and Dagster asset selection/lineage.

tasks.title: Add artifact path, show, and history commands
tasks.notes: Make generated output easy to find and inspect with commands such as `fbt artifact path <id>`, `fbt artifact show <id>`, and `fbt artifact history <id>`. Include artifact version, logical path, immutable storage path, runner/model, approval state, and generating run. User research analogs: DVC list/get/artifacts get --show-url, MLflow artifacts list/download, and Dagster asset catalog metadata.

tasks.title: Add review show and safer approval guidance
tasks.notes: Before users approve LLM/agent-generated artifacts, provide a direct review surface such as `fbt review show <artifact>` and guide users toward show/diff/status before `review approve`. User research analogs: Terraform plan, Pulumi preview, and MLflow model version details all support inspection before promotion.

tasks.title: Add top-level project doctor command
tasks.notes: Add `fbt doctor` as a single readiness check for project config, runner discovery, runner protocol initialization, target/state writability, and policy-relevant path constraints. User research analog: dbt debug checks project setup, local configuration, system environment, dependencies, and connection readiness.

tasks.title: Improve project validation and YAML authoring diagnostics
tasks.notes: Strengthen `fbt parse`/validation output with line-oriented, actionable YAML diagnostics and consider narrow scaffolding for new transforms. User research analogs: Terraform validate, kubectl explain, and dbt parse/debug reduce config-authoring ambiguity before execution.

tasks.title: Capture lineage standard export backlog
tasks.notes: Converted standard-format investigation into post-MVP tasks. Current lineage is fbt-native JSON; OpenLineage should be the first lineage export target, OpenTelemetry should cover execution traces and GenAI telemetry, OpenMetadata should be evaluated as a catalog integration, and graph/trace/catalog visualization should be delegated to standard-compatible tools rather than a custom fbt UI.

tasks.title: Define standard lineage, telemetry, and visualization export contracts
tasks.notes: Specify the command surface and stable mapping for exporting fbt-native lineage without replacing internal schemas. Cover artifact/artifact_version, transform, transform_run, source, eval, approval, policy, runner/model metadata, redaction rules, JSON output shape, and the explicit non-goal of building a custom lineage graph UI when standard-compatible viewers can consume the export.

tasks.title: Implement Marquez-compatible OpenLineage export for artifact lineage
tasks.notes: Implements `fbt export openlineage [--output PATH]` as OpenLineage RunEvent NDJSON. Maps fbt artifacts/artifact_versions to datasets, transforms to jobs, transform_runs to UUID-backed runs, and confidence, approval, eval, descriptor, model, and policy metadata to `fbt_` custom facets so Marquez/OpenLineage tooling can own visualization.

tasks.title: Add OpenTelemetry-compatible execution telemetry export
tasks.verification_override_reason: No network OTel backend is required for default verification; OTLP/JSON payload shape and CLI export are covered by Go tests and smoke.
tasks.notes: Implements `fbt export otel [--output PATH]` as local-first OTLP/JSON trace export. Build invocations and transform runs become spans, safe runner events become span events, and usage, cost, model, artifact, and policy metadata become attributes without adding a default network exporter.

tasks.title: Evaluate OpenMetadata catalog export
tasks.notes: Evaluated OpenMetadata catalog integration and decided against a base `fbt export openmetadata` command. The supported path is `fbt export openlineage` plus external OpenMetadata OpenLineage ingestion; direct OpenMetadata publishing remains an optional integration outside core.

tasks.title: Add conformance fixtures for standard exports
tasks.notes: Adds deterministic standard-export checks to `tests/conformance/run.sh`: generated OpenLineage and OTel payloads must contain expected standard keys, fbt facets/attributes, UUID-shaped OpenLineage run IDs, runner span events, and must exclude raw source content plus a redaction marker.

tasks.title: Document standard visualization integrations
tasks.verification_override_reason: Manual Marquez, Jaeger, Tempo, and Grafana backend smokes are intentionally outside the default local gate; docs link official integration paths and `make verify` validates references.
tasks.notes: Adds user-facing recipes for visualizing fbt lineage and telemetry through standard tools: OpenLineage events in Marquez for artifact/job/run lineage, OTLP/JSON traces in Jaeger, and Tempo/Grafana via a Collector or Alloy pipeline. Keeps fbt's own docs/explain surfaces lightweight and avoids implementing a custom graph UI.

tasks.title: Add opt-in real LLM runner smoke
tasks.verification_override_reason: `make real-llm-smoke` is intentionally skipped unless `FBT_REAL_LLM_RUNNER_COMMAND` is set; default verification covers the script and docs without network/provider credentials.
tasks.notes: Adds `make real-llm-smoke` and `scripts/smoke-real-llm.sh`, an environment-gated smoke that creates a temporary project and runs `doctor -> build -> artifact show` against an external stdio JSON-RPC LLM runner command without adding provider SDKs or network access to `make verify`.

tasks.title: Decide and close run/debug command surface
tasks.notes: Closed the MVP command surface by removing `run` and `debug` placeholders from CLI help/docs. `build` remains the execution command and diagnostics stay under `doctor`, `parse`, `state`, and `runner doctor`; former placeholders now return the normal unknown-command error.

tasks.title: Expand conformance beyond compact shell smoke
tasks.notes: Expanded the deterministic conformance matrix with schema error checks, clean rerun skip behavior, docs/export redaction, standard export determinism, dirty-state propagation after asset changes, and existing policy-denied commit safety without adding external services.

tasks.title: Emit full policy decision records during lifecycle
tasks.notes: Build now records policy decisions for allowed and denied commit checks, including check messages, candidate artifact version IDs, and decision timestamps. Generated docs include policy decisions, run results reference decision IDs, OTel export includes decision ID attributes, and conformance checks allowed/denied records.

tasks.title: Implement semantic descriptors for common document types
tasks.notes: Adds first-pass `text_normalized_v1` and `markdown_ast_v1` semantic descriptors for text/Markdown artifacts, persists them on artifact versions, and surfaces them in artifact inspection and generated docs while keeping raw descriptor digests as artifact version identity.

tasks.title: Capture external runner hardening backlog
tasks.notes: Captures the post-MVP runner extensibility gap: fbt core should stay provider/runtime-free, while OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Codex, Claude Code, and other integrations should be easy to add as out-of-process protocol runners.

tasks.title: Pass complete execution context to protocol runners
tasks.notes: Build now populates `fbt/runTransform` with resolved source inputs, current artifact-version inputs, descriptors, semantic descriptors, transform assets, runner config metadata, prior/current state, plan dirty reasons, and review context so external runners do not need to parse fbt project files themselves.

tasks.title: Harden runner process invocation with args, env, and cwd
tasks.notes: Adds runner `args` and optional `cwd` to project config and plugin manifests, passes configured args/cwd/env to runner processes, filters env passthrough to base variables plus declared names, and reports missing declared env names without printing values.

tasks.title: Enforce runner capability negotiation in doctor and build
tasks.notes: Makes runner `initialize` capabilities authoritative for protocol version, transform types, output artifact types, and output-candidate support. Build fails before transform execution on incompatibility, and doctor/runner validate report the same diagnostics.

tasks.title: Define safe CLI-agent adapter contract for Codex and Claude Code
tasks.notes: Defines the safe adapter contract for wrapping existing CLI agents behind the fbt stdio protocol, requiring staging workspaces, fail-closed policy translation, redacted events, and output candidates under work.outputs. Go and conformance tests verify outside-work candidates are rejected before official commit.

tasks.title: Add runner authoring kit and protocol conformance fixtures
tasks.notes: Adds a language-neutral runner authoring guide, JSON protocol fixtures, a reusable black-box runner conformance harness, and `make runner-conformance`; the strict fixture now runs in `make verify` against the source fake runner.

tasks.title: Clarify demo runners and external runner UX
tasks.notes: Renames generated support/incident runner identities and wrappers to `demo.llm`, `demo.agent`, and `bin/fbt-demo-*-runner`, updates bundled demo runner metadata and checked-in examples, and documents the replacement path through runner conformance, project runner config, doctor, and plan.

tasks.title: Define optional provider adapter packaging outside core
tasks.notes: Documents optional provider and CLI-agent adapter package conventions, project config, plugin manifests, PATH behavior, credential boundaries, versioning, and conformance checks for `fbt-runner-openai`, `fbt-runner-anthropic`, `fbt-runner-gemini`, `fbt-runner-codex-cli`, and `fbt-runner-claude-code` without adding SDKs to fbt core.

tasks.title: Add practical manual generation examples
tasks.notes: Adds external-runner, production-shaped examples for incident logs to incident response runbook and support inquiry/response logs to support resolution manual. The examples include realistic source records, output format assets, policies, deterministic section evals, review gates, and a parse/plan smoke that runs without provider calls.

tasks.title: Add optional OpenAI Responses runner
tasks.verification_override_reason: Real OpenAI API calls require a user-provided secret and are intentionally outside `make verify`; runner behavior is covered by an httptest Responses API fixture plus parse/plan example smoke.
tasks.notes: Adds an optional source-checkout `runners/openai` external runner that speaks fbt stdio JSON-RPC, reads `OPENAI_API_KEY`, calls the OpenAI Responses API, writes output candidates under `work.outputs`, and is wired into the practical examples through project-local wrappers.

tasks.title: Add Folio-inspired documentation site
tasks.notes: Adds an Astro/Starlight documentation site modeled after Folio's docs structure, with intro, get-started, CLI, runners, lineage/standards, and reference sections. GitHub Pages deployment and docs-site build are wired into the verification gate.

tasks.title: Refresh README using Folio structure
tasks.notes: Reworks the top-level README after Folio's public README pattern: centered identity, badges, short product definition, surfaces, docs, quickstart, install table, examples, lineage, releases, and repository harness.

tasks.title: Ground README and docs in actual user workflow
tasks.notes: Adds user-first docs grounded in a captured support quickstart, including actual command outputs, generated files, artifact excerpts, lineage/export outputs, and a standard-export graph image. Also fixes generated demo runner wrappers so the documented quickstart works from outside the source checkout and guards that with e2e smoke.

tasks.title: Remove ambiguous quickstart diagram
tasks.notes: Removes the ambiguous support-loop graphic from README and docs-site entry pages. The quickstart is now explained through actual command output, generated files, and standard export commands instead of an invented product diagram.

tasks.title: Define quickstart scope
tasks.notes: Defines quickstart as a small control-plane acceptance demo rather than a support-product demo, model-quality benchmark, realistic manual-generation workflow, or architecture walkthrough. Adds lifecycle-stage explanation and per-step intent text.

tasks.title: Clarify README product story
tasks.notes: Rewrites README as a product entry point: purpose, problem, concrete support-manual example, what fbt owns in the workflow, current capabilities, quickstart fixture, project structure, boundaries, install, and docs.

tasks.title: Maintain self-PDCA loop
tasks.notes: Standing self-PDCA loop checked after MVP task execution; quality score, active plans, feature list, and progress handoff are current and guarded by make verify.

tasks.title: Maintain permanent-fix loop
tasks.notes: Standing permanent-fix loop checked after MVP task execution; no repeated active failure required a new guard, and failure-log invariants remain enforced by make verify.
